subject: feat(burger-menu): complete implementation per BURGER_MENU pattern
body:
Align BurgerMenu with glow-props BURGER_MENU.md implementation pattern:
backdrop ownership, MenuItem interface, close-then-act delay, version
footer, and theme toggle icons.

- Extract useEscapeKey hook from inline keydown handler
- Move backdrop from MobileLayout into BurgerMenu (z-40, cursor-pointer
  for iOS Safari; parent header keeps z-50 for stacking context)
- Add MenuItem interface: disabled, separator, destructive, external,
  highlight, highlightColor, iconClass properties
- Add close-then-act pattern: menu closes first, action fires after
  150ms to prevent visual glitches with modal opens
- Route action errors through window.__debugPushError when available
- Add version footer prop (shows v0.1.0 from package.json)
- Add sun/moon icons to dark/light toggle in MenuThemeSection
- Add aria-label on theme toggle that updates with state
- Add arrow key + Home/End keyboard navigation
- Add no-print class to wrapper for print-to-PDF hiding

Tags: ui, burger-menu, a11y, mobile, pattern-alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: burger-menu
Semver: minor
